section_title: The pawnee may retain the goods pledged, not only for payment of the
content:
173. The pawnee may retain the goods pledged, not only for payment of the
right of
debt or the performance of the promise, but for the interest of the debt, and
retainer
all necessary expenses incurred by him in respect of the possession or for
the preservation of the goods pledged.
Pawnee not
